business.type_label: author / illustrator personal hub (children's books, graphic novels)

engine.ladder_reasoning: A creator site where the books, illustrations, videos and free comics ARE the proof — visitors browse the body of work to decide to follow/buy. Not selling defined expertise-for-hire (trust) and not a place; the portfolio is the argument.

goal.one_action: Join Ken's mailing list (and secondarily buy his books off-site) to become a follower of the author

structure.archetype_note: Sprawling WordPress author hub: home is a long scroll (intro, crowdfund status, book grid, bio, blog teaser, multiple video embeds, free-comic promos, newsletter form). Buying happens off-site on Gumroad; on-domain conversion is the mailing-list form. One nav item (/about-ken-lamug/) is broken (HTTP 500); real About lives at /about-me/.

mapped.observed_as: top nav (Books, About Me, Resources, Contact)
Howdy! / Welcome to the website of Ken Lamug
Mentions in... (Kirkus, NPR, Publishers Weekly, SCBWI)
Learn how to draw Petro / Book design & publishing / Ghastly Ghosts trailer / Petro Book 2 demo (embedded videos)
Get updates, join my mailing list
social links (Twitter, Facebook, YouTube, Instagram, Linktree)

unmapped.observed: Get My Books! + My Books grid (19 titles, each links to a detail page, no prices, purchase off-site on Gumroad)
unmapped.why_no_fit: No canonical section expresses an author's own-works bibliography/catalog with per-work subpages and off-site buying

unmapped.observed: Crowdfund Status (status of a live crowdfunding campaign)
unmapped.why_no_fit: No canonical section for a campaign-progress / crowdfund status callout
blog-teaser strip has no dedicated canonical id

unmapped.observed: Free: Talbot Toluca / Spooky / 2-in-1 Comic (free downloadable comic lead-magnets via Gumroad)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Free giveaway content used to grow audience is neither a product nor a standard section

proposed_new.name: works-catalog
proposed_new.evidence: 'My Books' page = grid of 19 book titles, each linking to a per-work detail page, no prices, buying redirects off-site to Gumroad/retailers — the creator's own bibliography as the site's spine.

components_needed: book-catalog grid (cover cards linking to detail pages)

confidence.why: fetch_quality is partial (only /about-ken-lamug/ headless-rendered, and that page is a 500 error); section lists for other pages captured but not fully rendered. Structure and intent are clear enough, but capped at medium per capture quality.

gap_findings: Diffuse creator hub with NO single dominant conversion: mailing-list form (on-site), buy-books (off-site Gumroad redirect), send-coffee donate (buymeacoffee), follow (Linktree/social), author-visit booking, and free-comic downloads all compete. The 'one conversion action' assumption strains here.
works-catalog (own bibliography, per-work subpages, off-site buying) not expressible in the closed capability vocab.
Free downloadable lead-magnet comics (freebie-for-signup pattern) have no capability or section representation — distinct from press-kit-downloads (B2B) and from catalog.
'Send coffee' (buymeacoffee) is a donate mechanism that co-exists with subscribe as a secondary tip jar — engine model assumes a single goal mechanism.
